overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the industrial Santo Domingo district during golden hour. The scene features massive elevated highway overpasses, digital billboards, industrial smokestacks with burning flames, and futuristic architecture bathed in warm orange sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with industrial backdrop

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with support pillars
large illuminated billboard displaying purple advertisements with faces and Japanese text
tall industrial chimneys with flames and smoke burning against the sky
futuristic mega-corporation tower with illuminated signage visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive elevated highway overpass in the industrial district. Large digital billboards displaying purple advertisements line the right side while industrial smokestacks burn in the distance on the left. The Arasaka tower looms ahead against the golden hour sky, and the concrete sidewalk stretches forward under the highway's shadow.

events.description: passing green street sign reading 'Brandon' mounted on a pole

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved sidewalk, passing under the highway structure

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: green street sign with white text reading 'Brandon'

segments.scene_description: The path curves gently while remaining under the highway overpass. A green street sign reading 'Brandon' appears briefly on the left. The purple digital billboards exit the frame as the industrial smokestacks grow larger on the left. The highway structure now passes directly overhead, casting long shadows across the walkway.

events.description: large digital billboard advertising 'CIRKUS' becomes visible on the left side
approaching traffic light and overhead gantry with 'SANTO DOMINGO' street sign

agents.ego_description: walking toward the intersection following other pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: walking ahead toward the crosswalk at the intersection

entered.detail: large vertical billboard displaying 'CIRKUS' with an image of a character in combat gear
overhead gantry sign with white text reading 'SANTO DOMINGO' and directional arrows
red traffic light mounted on pole at the intersection ahead

segments.scene_description: Approaching an intersection in the industrial district with more open sky visible. A large digital billboard advertising 'CIRKUS' dominates the left side of the street. The overhead gantry displays 'SANTO DOMINGO' indicating the district name. Pedestrians walk ahead toward the crosswalk as vehicles pass on the road below, and the traffic light shows red ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a shadowed industrial corridor that gradually opens into a bright, bustling city intersection. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway overpass, moving past purple digital billboards on the right while burning industrial smokestacks and the distant Arasaka tower frame the golden hour sky. As the path curves, the purple advertisements fade from view and the highway structure casts deeper shadows across the walkway, passing a green street sign for Brandon. The scene then expands as the camera approaches an intersection, shifting from the oppressive overhead concrete to a more open vista dominated by a large Cirkus billboard and a Santo Domingo district gantry. Finally, the perspective settles on a red traffic light and pedestrians crossing the street as vehicles flow through the sun-drenched industrial landscape.
